rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>我一直都很想要这系列的服装呢！<unk[5:0]>
没想到竟然有一天能在监视堡垒买到它！
这系列的装备
运用了希卡族的技术，
听说它可以让人在行动时<Color=red>不容易发出声音<Color=white>。<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:257]>只要穿上它，
就能更容易捕捉到马匹。
还有在和怪物战斗时，
也能更轻松地进行<Color=red>偷袭攻击<Color=white>！
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>不过，就算把我现在持有的<Color=red>矿石<Color=white>都卖掉，
我也买不起。
我是不是应该去<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>里再挖些矿石呢……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>這是我從之前就很想要的服裝！<unk[5:0]>
居然能在監視堡壘買到！
這樣裝備是採用希卡族技術
打造而成的，
聽說穿上它行動時<Color=red>不容易發出聲音<Color=white>喔。<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:257]>只要穿上它，
不只捕捉馬匹變得更加容易，
和怪物戰鬥時，
也能更簡單地<Color=red>發動偷襲<Color=white>喔！
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>不過就算我把手上的<Color=red>礦石<Color=white>賣掉，
湊到的錢也買不起……
我是不是應該去<Color=red>洞窟<Color=white>挖掘更多礦石呢……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]><Ruby={2:4}まえ>前から <Ruby={2:2}ほ>欲しかった<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服なんスよ！<unk[5:0]>
まさか <Ruby={6:12}かんしとりで>監視砦で<Ruby={2:2}か>買える<Ruby={2:2}ひ>日が<Ruby={2:2}く>来るとは！
この<Ruby={4:6}そうび>装備は
シーカーの<Ruby={4:8}ぎじゅつ>技術を<Ruby={4:4}くし>駆使して <Ruby={2:4}つく>作られてて
<Ruby={2:4}うご>動いても <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}おと>音がたちにくい<Color=white>らしいんス<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:257]>これさえ<Ruby={2:2}き>着れば
<Ruby={2:4}うま>馬が<Ruby={2:4}つか>捕まえやすくなるだけじゃなく
<Ruby={4:6}まもの>魔物と<Ruby={2:6}たたか>戦う<Ruby={2:4}とき>時だって
<Color=red><Ruby={6:6}ふいう>不意打ち<Ruby={4:8}こうげき>攻撃<Color=white>しやすくなるんスよ！
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>でも <Ruby={4:4}ても>手持ちの<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}こうせき>鉱石<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}う>売っても
<Ruby={2:2}か>買えそうにないし
<Ruby={6:10}こうせきほ>鉱石掘りに <Color=red><Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟<Color=white>にでも<Ruby={2:2}い>行こうかな…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>I've wanted this outfit for a while. Never
thought I'd eventually be able to get it
at Lookout Landing.
Anyway, it's made with Sheikah tech!


Word is you're <Color=red>way quieter <Color=white>when you run
around in this gear.

<unk[3:0:257]>So...that means catching horses would be
easier, for one thing.

And just think about all the surprise
attacks you could unleash on monsters!

<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>But even if I sold the <Color=red>ore <Color=white>I've got, I still
wouldn't be able to afford it.

Maybe I should go rooting around in a
<Color=red>cave <Color=white>for ore.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>这里的装备虽然也不错，
但我现在感兴趣的是
一个叫<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>的希卡族村落里
售卖的<Color=red>潜行系列<Color=white>装备。
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>据说这种装备是用希卡族的技术
制作出来的，
穿上之后
便<Color=red>不易发出脚步声<Color=white>。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>雖然這邊的裝備也不壞……
但在一處名叫<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>的希卡族村莊裡，
有賣一種<Color=red>潛行系列<Color=white>的裝備，
我現在比較在意那套服裝呢。
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>因為我聽說那是採用
希卡族技術所打造而成，
聽說只要穿上它，
就會<Color=red>變得不容易發出腳步聲<Color=white>喔。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>ここの<Ruby={4:6}そうび>装備も いいんだけど
<Color=red>カカリコ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>っていう シーカー<Ruby={2:4}ぞく>族の<Ruby={2:4}むら>村で<Ruby={2:2}う>売ってる
<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}しの>忍びシリーズ<Color=white>の<Ruby={4:6}そうび>装備が
<Ruby={2:4}いま>今 <Ruby={2:2}き>気になってるんスよねぇ
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>なんでも シーカーの<Ruby={4:8}ぎじゅつ>技術を<Ruby={4:4}くし>駆使して

らしいんスよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>This outfit is pretty great, but I've been
obsessing over a different one lately.

Specifically, the <Color=red>stealth series<Color=white> outfit.
They sell it over in the Sheikah area,
<Color=red>Kakariko Village<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>Word is that it uses Sheikah tech!


I guess wearing it <Color=red>makes you super quiet
when you move<Color=white>.

位置有些偏僻，

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>I'd love to make a quick trip out to
Kakariko Village to buy some things.

But it's a small village to the southeast,
and it's fairly secluded and hard to find.
I always get lost looking for it...
<unk[3:0:268]>Although I guess now I could use those
huge <Color=red>Ring Ruins <Color=white>as a <Color=red>landmark<Color=white>, so maybe
I'm fretting over nothing.

rows.CNzh:

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>The outfits here aren't bad.


But I've been drooling over the stealth
clothing that makes you <Color=red>super quiet when
moving around<Color=white>.
Except it's only sold in <Color=red>Kakariko Village<Color=white>...


<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>If I had that set, I'd be catching horses
left and right. Not to mention all the
<Color=red>surprise attacks<Color=white>. The possibilities!
It's no wonder everyone wants
that clothing.

<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Kakariko is small and secluded, so I
always get lost trying to find my
way there.
I suppose now there's those <Color=red>Ring Ruins<Color=white>
that'll serve as a <Color=red>landmark<Color=white>, so I'm sure
I'll have no problems next time.
